title: enable_beads copier toggle (future)
description: Generated projects get bd init + the CLAUDE/AGENTS beads section. All 3 real repos use beads; scaffold does not ship it. Not in the current testing goal.

title: scaffold CI runs tests/unit too
description: e2e.yml: uv run pytest covers tests/unit + tests/end_to_end. Full pytest green in CI.

title: devtools/README.md shipped in template
description: template/devtools/README.md.jinja, toggle-aware: one line per shipped tool (graph/lcom/data_clumps/state_candidates + astgrep/jscpd when on): what it detects + how to run.

title: graph.py --assert inject-test in E2E
description: Parallel to astgrep/jscpd inject tests: write a god-module/cycle into a generated project -> assert graph --assert exits non-zero (gate bites) -> revert -> 0.

title: unit-test graph.py --assert — arch fitness logic
description: Synthetic god-module (fan-in AND fan-out > bottleneck_degree) / import-cycle / file>file_max each fail --assert; clean -> exit 0; [tool.structure] read + defaults merged when absent.

title: unit-test state_candidates.py — shared-param logic
description: >=2 staticmethods sharing a param (>=half), no __init__ -> flagged with param; __init__/pydantic/add_args+run -> skipped. Positive+negative.

title: unit-test data_clumps.py — maximal-set logic
description: {a,b,c} carried whole by >=4 funcs -> that maximal clump reported; support<4 / scattered -> none. Positive+negative.

title: unit-test lcom.py — LCOM4 correctness
description: Feed AST fixtures: 2 disjoint self-field method groups -> lcom4()==2 + components; cohesive class -> 1; interface-impl/abstract/all-trivial -> skipped. Positive+negative.
